description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential structure with a modern, open floor plan and a flat roof. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with large windows allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The layout includes a spacious garage attached to one side, and a wooden deck or patio area at the rear. The front entrance is clearly defined, and the building is accompanied by a detailed architectural floor plan displayed adjacent to it. The windows are arranged in a mostly linear pattern, with some grouped together for larger openings. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, and adjacent floor plan display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the adjacent floor plan.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage and the open layout of the living spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, back patio area, and grouped windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden deck and the connection between the garage and main living area.
